name: Broadway Industrial Group Limited
summary: Broadway Industrial Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells precision-machined components and assemblies for electronics, automotive, oil and gas, and other industries. It manufactures various actuator arms, and related assembled parts primarily for the hard disk drive industry. The company also distributes precision machined components; and provides business and management consultancy services. It operates in Thailand, the People's Republic of China, Singapore, and internationally. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Singapore.
